# Gold Advisor

> Independent 2026 reviews and original data comparing U.S. Gold IRA companies on fees, minimums, metals, storage, and reputation. Written by precious-metals analyst Aaron Tal (JPost.com, TipRanks.com).

## Key data (2026)
- Lowest Gold IRA minimum among leading providers: $10,000
- Average Gold IRA minimum (tracked companies): ~$21,000
- Typical all-in annual fees: $200-$300 (flat-fee custodians)
- U.S. states that generally tax investment bullion: 6 plus Washington, D.C.; generally exempt: 34; no statewide sales tax: 5

## Top 5 Gold IRA companies (ranked)
1. Augusta Precious Metals — 9.8/10 — Education and high-net-worth — https://gold-advisor.com/gold-ira-companies/augusta-precious-metals-review/
2. Goldco — 9.6/10 — 401(k)/IRA rollovers — https://gold-advisor.com/gold-ira-companies/goldco-review/
3. Priority Gold — 9.4/10 — Low minimum — https://gold-advisor.com/gold-ira-companies/priority-gold-review/
4. American Hartford Gold — 9.3/10 — First-time buyers — https://gold-advisor.com/gold-ira-companies/american-hartford-gold-review/
5. Birch Gold Group — 9.1/10 — Metals variety — https://gold-advisor.com/gold-ira-companies/birch-gold-group-review/

## Notes
- Affiliate disclosure: some outbound company links earn commissions (rel=nofollow sponsored); this does not affect editorial rankings.
- All figures reviewed June 2026 and may change; verify directly. Educational information, not financial, tax, or legal advice.
